skills.name: cross-identifier-reconciliation
skills.description: Cross-identifier reconciliation maps multiple per-metabolite identifiers (HMDB, KEGG, PubChem, common name, LIPID MAPS, ChEBI) to a single RefMet standardized name and flags rows where those identifiers resolve to conflicting names, enabling reliable cross-dataset metabolite linkage for meta-analysis. It is essential when input dataset files carry heterogeneous identifier columns from different analytical platforms (e.g., Metabolon, Broad) that must be harmonized before any downstream overlap or association analysis.
